home.title: Base64 Shuttle — Free Online Encoder & Decoder Toolkit
home.subtitle: Encode and decode Base64, URL, HTML, Hex, Unicode, and JWT tokens directly in your browser. 100% private, no uploads, no registration.
home.feature1Desc: Base64, URL, HTML, Hex, Unicode, JWT — all encoding and decoding tools in one place.
home.feature2Desc: All encoding and decoding happens in your browser. No data is ever uploaded to any server.
home.feature3Desc: Instant conversion as you type with debounced processing for smooth performance.
home.feature4Desc: Convert files to Base64 and decode Base64 back to downloadable files with image preview.
home.feature5Desc: Use all tools instantly — no sign-up, no email, no tracking. Just open and encode.
home.feature6Desc: No limits, no ads, no hidden fees. Full-featured encoding toolkit at zero cost.
home.step1Desc: Select your encoding tool — Base64, URL, HTML, Hex, Unicode, or JWT decoder
home.step2Desc: Paste or type your text in the input field, or upload a file for Base64 conversion
home.step3Desc: Get the encoded or decoded result instantly. Copy or download with one click
home.whyTitle: The Complete Encoding Toolkit for Developers
home.whyP1: Base64 encoding is one of the most widely used encoding schemes in web development, API integration, and data transfer. From embedding images in CSS and HTML using data URIs to encoding credentials for HTTP Basic Authentication, Base64 is everywhere. But developers often need more than just Base64 — URL encoding for query parameters, HTML entity encoding for safe content rendering, Hex encoding for binary data analysis, Unicode escaping for internationalized strings, and JWT decoding for API authentication debugging. Base64 Shuttle brings all these tools together in one clean, fast, and privacy-focused interface.
home.whyP2: Unlike other online encoding tools that upload your data to remote servers for processing, Base64 Shuttle performs every operation entirely in your browser using native JavaScript APIs. Your sensitive data — API keys, authentication tokens, proprietary strings — never leaves your device. This makes Base64 Shuttle ideal for security-conscious developers, enterprise teams, and anyone working with confidential data. The real-time preview, bidirectional encoding/decoding, and one-click copy/download features make it the fastest way to handle encoding tasks without installing any software.
home.privacyBadge: Your data never leaves your device

about.heroSubtitle: A fast, private, browser-based encoding and decoding toolkit by ShuttleLab
about.serviceP1: Base64 Shuttle is a free online encoding and decoding toolkit that processes everything directly in your browser. Unlike traditional online tools that upload your data to remote servers, Base64 Shuttle uses native browser APIs — btoa/atob, TextEncoder/TextDecoder, and DOM manipulation — to encode and decode your data without ever leaving your device. Supporting Base64, URL, HTML entities, Hex, Unicode, and JWT token decoding, it is the most comprehensive browser-based encoding tool available.
about.serviceP2: Built by ShuttleLab, Base64 Shuttle serves developers, security engineers, API integrators, and students who need fast, reliable encoding and decoding. Whether you are debugging JWT tokens from an API response, encoding URLs for query parameters, converting text to Hex for binary analysis, or encoding strings to Base64 for data URI embedding, Base64 Shuttle handles it all with zero privacy risk and instant results.
about.safeDesc: All encoding and decoding happens locally in your browser. No data is uploaded, no data is collected, and no third parties can access your input.
about.privacyDesc: Start encoding immediately — no sign-up, no email, no tracking. Just open the tool and start working.
about.ttlDesc: Base64, URL encoding, HTML entities, Hex, Unicode escapes, and JWT decoding — all tools in one unified interface.
about.fastDesc: Real-time encoding and decoding with 300ms debounced processing. Results appear as you type, with no server round-trip latency.
about.use1: Web developers encoding data URIs, credentials, and API payloads
about.use2: Security engineers analyzing JWT tokens, Hex dumps, and encoded data
about.use3: Frontend developers handling URL encoding and HTML entity escaping
about.use4: Students and educators learning encoding principles and data formats
about.contactDesc: Have questions, feedback, or need support?
about.supportDesc: Base64 Shuttle is crafted with care by ShuttleLab — completely free with no limits. If it has helped you encode or decode even a single string, sharing it with friends who need it is the best support we could ask for.

privacyPage.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPage.intro: At Base64 Shuttle, your privacy is our core value. This Privacy Policy explains our approach to data collection and processing when you use base64.shuttlelab.org.
privacyPage.section1Content: Base64 Shuttle does not collect, store, or transmit any of your input data or personal information. All encoding and decoding operations occur entirely within your web browser using native JavaScript APIs (btoa, atob, TextEncoder, TextDecoder, DOM manipulation). Your data never leaves your device.
privacyPage.section2Content: Base64 Shuttle uses your browser's localStorage to store your preferences, such as theme selection (light/dark/system) and language settings (English/Chinese). This data remains on your device and is never transmitted to our servers.
privacyPage.section3Content: Unlike traditional online encoding tools, Base64 Shuttle performs all operations locally in your browser. There is no server-side processing, no data uploads, and no temporary storage on remote servers. This design ensures complete privacy for your data.
privacyPage.section4Content: Base64 Shuttle is hosted on Cloudflare for content delivery. Cloudflare may collect standard web server logs (IP address, browser type, access time) as part of normal CDN operation. We do not use analytics trackers, advertising networks, or any other third-party services that collect user data.
privacyPage.section5Content: Base64 Shuttle does not use cookies. All user preferences are stored in localStorage, which is not transmitted to our servers.
privacyPage.section6Content: Base64 Shuttle does not knowingly collect any personal information from children under 13. Since we do not collect any personal data at all, our service is safe for users of all ages.
privacyPage.section7Content: We may update this Privacy Policy periodically. Any changes will be reflected in the 'Last updated' date above. Your continued use of Base64 Shuttle after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.
privacyPage.section8Content: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at support@shuttlelab.org.

termsPage.title: Terms of Service
termsPage.intro: Welcome to Base64 Shuttle. These Terms of Service govern your use of base64.shuttlelab.org. By accessing or using Base64 Shuttle, you agree to be bound by these terms.
termsPage.section1Content: Base64 Shuttle is a free, browser-based encoding and decoding toolkit. All processing occurs locally in your browser — no data is uploaded to our servers. The service is provided as-is by ShuttleLab at no cost to the user.
termsPage.section2Content: By using Base64 Shuttle, you represent that you are at least 13 years old and have the authority to enter into this agreement. If you do not agree with any part of these terms, you must not use our service.
termsPage.section3Content: We grant you a limited, non-exclusive, non-transferable license to access and use Base64 Shuttle for personal and professional purposes. You may use the tool to encode and decode data you own or have permission to process.
termsPage.section4Content: You are responsible for the data you process through Base64 Shuttle. You agree to only process data you own or have legal permission to handle. You must not use the service for any illegal purpose.
termsPage.section5Content: Base64 Shuttle and its original content, features, and functionality are owned by ShuttleLab. The tool uses standard web APIs and encoding algorithms that are in the public domain.
termsPage.section6Content: Base64 Shuttle is provided 'as is' without warranties of any kind. We do not guarantee that the service will be uninterrupted, error-free, or produce specific results.
termsPage.section7Content: ShuttleLab shall not be liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages arising from your use of Base64 Shuttle, including but not limited to loss of data, loss of profits, or business interruption.
termsPage.section8Content: Base64 Shuttle may contain links to other ShuttleLab products or third-party websites. We are not responsible for the content or practices of these external sites.
termsPage.section9Content: We reserve the right to modify these Terms at any time. Changes will be effective immediately upon posting. Your continued use of Base64 Shuttle after changes constitutes acceptance of the new terms.
termsPage.section10Content: For questions about these Terms, contact us at support@shuttlelab.org.

base64Encode.title: Base64 Encode Online – Free Text & File Encoder
base64Encode.subtitle: Convert any text, code snippet, or binary file to Base64 in seconds. Base64 Shuttle runs entirely in your browser, so your data stays private and never touches a server.

base64Decode.title: Base64 Decode Online – Free Base64 String Decoder
base64Decode.subtitle: Instantly convert Base64-encoded strings back to plain text. Base64 Shuttle decodes everything in your browser, keeping your data completely private.

urlEncode.title: URL Encode Online – Free Percent-Encoding Tool
urlEncode.subtitle: Convert special characters to URL-safe percent-encoded format in seconds. Base64 Shuttle encodes everything locally in your browser for fast, private results.

htmlEncode.title: HTML Encode Online – Free HTML Entity Encoder
htmlEncode.subtitle: Convert special characters to HTML entities instantly. Protect your web pages from XSS attacks and safely display code snippets using this free browser-based encoder.

jwtDecoder.title: JWT Decoder Online – Free JSON Web Token Inspector
jwtDecoder.subtitle: Decode and inspect any JWT token in seconds. View the header, payload, and signature in a clean, readable format—entirely in your browser.

hexEncode.title: Hex Encode Online – Free Hexadecimal Encoder
hexEncode.subtitle: Convert any text or binary data to its hexadecimal byte representation instantly. Base64 Shuttle processes everything locally in your browser for fast, private encoding.

unicodeConverter.title: Unicode Converter Online – Free Character Encoder & Decoder
unicodeConverter.subtitle: Convert any text to Unicode code points, HTML entities, or escape sequences instantly. Base64 Shuttle processes everything in your browser for fast, private results.
